news:news.news:title: Meta and YouTube were found liable in a social media addiction trial, while the UN recognized the enslavement of Africans as a grave crime against humanity.
news:news.news:keywords: social media addiction lawsuit, UN resolution on slavery, political shifts in the US, mass grave discovery in Kenya, Ukrainian drone incidents

news:news.news:title: Global stock markets rose amid optimism over a potential Iran peace plan, while concerns about fuel shortages in Europe persist due to ongoing tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran peace plan impact on markets, Europe fuel shortage concerns, AI datacenter construction moratorium, TSA funding and airline operations, Prediction market regulations

news:news.news:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale features significant discounts on various tech products, while Meta announces layoffs amid a shift towards AI investment.
news:news.news:keywords: Amazon Big Spring Sale discounts, Meta layoffs and AI investment, Spotify artist protection against AI, Razer Blade 16 gaming laptop features, Disney metaverse challenges

news:news.news:title: The Seahawks will open the NFL season on Wednesday, while MLB predictions highlight the Dodgers' potential for a three-peat.
news:news.news:keywords: NFL season opener changes, Arizona basketball coaching news, Puka Nacua legal issues, Yu Darvish injury update, MLB season predictions

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include new insights into diabetes treatment, the search for extraterrestrial life, and the behavior of pollinators and deep-sea species.
news:news.news:keywords: metformin brain pathway discovery, habitable exoplanets, deep-sea species discovery, honey bee social behavior, insulin pill advancements

news:news.news:title: High oil prices could lead to a global recession, while geopolitical tensions and local political shifts are impacting various regions.
news:news.news:keywords: global economic outlook, Denmark political situation, Iran conflict implications, Australia EU trade agreement, impact of oil prices on economy

news:news.news:title: TSA workers face uncertainty amid a government shutdown, while Delta Airlines suspends special services for Congress members as funding battles continue.
news:news.news:keywords: TSA funding and government shutdown, Delta Airlines Congress service suspension, impact of Iran war on energy prices, prediction markets regulation, effects of corporate jargon on employee performance

news:news.news:title: Meta faces a $375 million penalty for misleading users about product safety, while Apple and NASA announce significant updates and plans for their technologies.
news:news.news:keywords: Meta's legal issues, NASA's lunar base plans, Apple's Siri updates, OpenAI's project discontinuation, Arm's new CPU for AI

news:news.news:title: Hubert Davis was fired as UNC's basketball coach following an early NCAA tournament exit, while other sports news includes significant player contracts and rule changes.
news:news.news:keywords: coaching changes in college basketball, Tiger Woods return to golf, NBA injury updates, NFL player contracts, MLB player contracts

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include advancements in insulin delivery, memory storage, and the behavior of honey bees, alongside significant findings in astronomy and paleontology.
news:news.news:keywords: insulin delivery advancements, honey bee behavior, memory storage in the brain, radiation damage mechanisms, new species discoveries

news:news.news:title: Zuckerberg and Huang Join Trump’s AI Panel as Global Markets Rally on Iran Peace Hopes
